feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: adding value to title in dynpro
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Im trying to add a sale number wich user chose. 

i tried this in PBO (SET TITLEBAR 'TITLE' WITH p_vbeln. )

the title is : Retrofit Sales Angebotsbeleg and i want to add the number that user has chosen.

is it possible ?

entry.title: Error occurs on hdbviews execution after adding meins field to FBL3H
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am adding meins to fbl3h but when I try to execute HDBviews for adding new field to FBL3H it occurs error. Also when I delete the meins field error become disapeared.

Thanks for reply.

entry.title: what can i do when a email is not sent to when the task is overdue in qm02 tcode
entry.content: what can I do when an email is not for one user when the task is overdue in QM02 TCode

entry.title: Table that contains the system texts depending on the language like EN/ES, etc
entry.content:
Hi everyone! I’m new to SAP and I wanted to know which table contains the system texts depending on the language. For example, in transaction se11 the following texts are displayed and I wanted to know from which table they are obtained, since I entered the transaction code but it does not say which table it gets the texts from. Thank you very much!!! Regards.

This texts:

entry.title: Extend CDS View with a new field and ValueHelp
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to extend a CDS view with a new field and value help?

I am trying to extend the Standard CDS C_Incompl_SalesDocWL_F2430.

With this standard view I_DeliveryBlockReason.

This is my extended view

The new field appears, the information is coming, the search is working. The only thing missing is the value help.

Does anyone know how can I solve this?

entry.title: When I transport the class, do the methods in it also transport?
entry.content:
Hi Master,

I have three systems : S4D ,S4C and S4P.

I transport the ZCL_IM_MM_PROCESS_PO_CUST class in the S4D system to the S4C system and then to the S4P system.

 

 

 

When I go to the S4P system, why can't I see the new request in the requests of the methods?
While I transport the class object, didn't I transport the methods? What did I transport?

 

 

 

When we transport classes, don't their methods also transport?

My other teammates also work on several methods of the class. When I transport the class, I don't want to transport their codes too 🙂

Thanks

entry.title: How should i call a BRF+ on CDS VIEW inner join where condition
entry.content:
Hello.
I have a request where I need to create a cds view that uses several values ​​that come from a BRF+.
It would look something like the example below:

defines view ZSD_DDL_NOTA_FISCAL
as select from vbap
left outer join VBPA on vbap.vbeln = vbpa.vbeln 
and vbap.POSNR = VBPA.posnr 


and vbpa.parvw = BRF+  <---

    key vbap.vbeln,
    key vbap.posnr,
    key vbpa.parvw,
    vbpa.kunnr



Would there be a way to do this search in BRF+ directly in the condition of a select?

thanks in advance

entry.title: error in Eclipse when creating a table function
entry.content:
Hello Expert i'm recieving this error in Eclipse while trying to create a table function for a CDS: The semantic file store doesn't exist and can not be accessed.

I've in Eclipse > Hana perspective > Create table function, i'm been asked to enter or select the parent folder

no mather the folder i provide and the name i'm having that error.

i'm on

Version: 2023-12 (4.30.0) , Build id: 20231201-2043

How can i solve it please?

Thank you

entry.title: Return 404 when accessing ABAP API in SAP on premise
entry.content:
Hello.

Our environment is local, I developed an API, where it is possible to access it internally, but when I'm outside the company I don't receive the expected feedback, I checked the rules made in the firewall, understand that they are correct.


Below is the return I got "404 Not Found".

 

 

 

I will be grateful if someone helps me!
Neemias.

entry.title: SAP EWM Stock management - Difference between GUID_STOCK and GUID_STOCK0
entry.content:
Hello all,

in some cases SAP will increase the stock counter (tech. STOCK_CNT) from the value 000000 to 000001, 000002, ... In that case the GUID_STOCK and the GUID_STOCK0 of the physical stock getting different. In case of having stock counter 000000, GUID_STOCK and GUID_STOCK are identically.

On the other hand the available quanties are all maintained with the GUID_STOCK0.

My question is, in which situation does SAP change the stock counter to a value 000001 or higher? 

Thank you very much!

Best regards,

Dominik

entry.title: SLT Central finance data replication using RFC commutation
entry.content:
Hi All,
Can anyone let me know how the data is passed from SAP SLT to the target system when the connection is based on RFC Communication? I was trying to technically understand how the data was being replicated to the CFIN system from the source system using SLT.

I found out that there are function modules responsible for posting data into CFIN (e.g., FINS_CFIN_AC_DOC_GENERATE_BULK, FINS_CFIN_CO_CENTRAL_POSTING, etc.), but these function modules are not remote-enabled. I read in a blog that the MWB (Migration Workbench) object holds the rules that transform the data from the table-based structures on the source system into the remote function module interface of the central finance system.

I want to know how the data is finally passed to functions such as FINS_CFIN_AC_DOC_GENERATE_BULK from SLT, which then posts the data into CFIN ?

Regards,
John

entry.title: select multiple SALV Rows
Even though gt_output2 is empty, the previous data is displayed.
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

There are 2 lines of data in gt_output. If the user selects the 1st line and continues, gt_output2 is filled with 8 data points and the next screen is pressed (call screen 0200).






But if the user selects the 2nd line in gt_output and continues, the previous data appears on the screen even though gt_output2 is not full.
I use free, clear in most of my codes, but the previous data is still printed on the screen.

 

Even though I set gt_output2 to where gt_output2 is printed, it prints the previous data to the screen. (In this part of the code (in the debug) gt_output2 is empty)

 

 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: how to send a url image, pdf file, text file to AL11
entry.content: I got a requirement and in that I am getting attachement text from sales order and then I need to send it to AL11 and Could you please provide the steps to send url, image format, pdf file, to AL11 directory...I got the text attachment from sales order  into internal table. If it is image format or pdf file, url attachment then what is best way to send it to AL11 directory

entry.title: Questions about PERS_HANDLE and ADDR_PERSON_NUMBER_GET, changing BP Company to Person
entry.content:
Hello, 

I was given an assignent to create a tool that changes a BP entered as a company to a person 

this is done by changing the TYPE in BUT000 changing ADRC PERS_HANDLE to 'X'.

The problem I encountered is I was asked to use FM ADDR_PERSON_NUMBER_GET I dont really understand what it does to my knowledge it will retrieve the next avaliable PERS Number avaliable to be distributed.

My main problem is that I couldnt find what a person handle is and would be greatfull if any information can be given in regards to it or any information that might be usefull regarding the FM or generall information in case anyone has done anything similar.
Thank you for your reply in advance take care!

entry.title: Transport from Development to 2 test Systems
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have 1 Development System connected to 2 Test Systems.

I have transported all my objects to the first Test System successfuly. Now i need to transport all the objects once again to the second Test System.

When i try to do it, i get the error that the package is already assigned to the first Test System.

What is the best way to do this? 

I am aware of the Transportgroup, but i don't want to simultaneously transport objects to both systems because their purpose may differ in the future.

entry.title: Why am i getting duplicates even after using DISTINCT any wrong join i have used?
entry.content:
Hi There!
I wrote this query to achieve the attached output... But it is giving me improper/duplicated results. The data have 464 rows but i'm getting 1008 rows. Kindly let me know what mistake I made in the join conditions.  Thanks in advance.

 

select distinct T001L.LGORT as sloc,MKPF.BUDAT as Year,MKPF.XBLNR as ReferenceDoc,MKPF.XABLN as GRGISlip,
MSEG.BWART as MovementType,MSEG.SHKZG as DC,
(select case MSEG.SHKZG when 'S' then MSEG.MENGE else 0.0 end) as Receipt,

(select case MSEG.SHKZG when 'H' then MSEG.MENGE else 0.0 end) as Issue,
MSEG.DMBTR as Amount,MSEG.MENGE as BalQuantity,
MBEW.VERPR as PricePerUnit, MBEW.SALK3 as BalanceAmount,
t156t.BTEXT as Comment from mara

INNER join mseg  on 

mara.MATNR=mseg.MATNR

INNER  join t001l 

on t001l.LGORT=mseg.LGORT
 
INNER  join mkpf 

on mkpf.MBLNR=mseg.MBLNR 


INNER  join mard 

on mard.MATNR=MARA.MATNR 


INNER join mbew 

on mbew.MATNR=MARA.MATNR 

AND MBEW.LVORM=MARA.LVORM 

INNER JOIN t156t 

     ON  t156t.bwart = mseg.bwart 

     AND t156t.sobkz = mseg.sobkz 

     AND t156t.kzbew = mseg.kzbew 

     AND t156t.kzzug = mseg.kzzug 

     AND t156t.kzvbr = mseg.kzvbr

where 

MARA.MATNR='1L90MHVB10250A'

and (MKPF.budat between '20200101' and '20231231') 

and MSEG.BUKRS='VN01' and MSEG.WERKS='VNSD' AND t001l.lgort='RM01'and t156t.SPRAS='E' ;

entry.title: RAP OData service - Issues with 3-Tier Entity Hierarchy in managed scenario.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My team and I are working on some custom developments involving UI5 freestyle apps and a RAP based OData service for the backend. Our main requirement revolves around a three-levels entity hierarchy consisting of FormHeader -> FormItems -> ItemImputations as you can see in the following service definition:

All the navigation properties are present in the service metadata and are working fine when navigating from FormHeader to FormItems, but the problem arose when trying to navigate from FromItems to Imputations (bottom entity in the 3-tier hierarchy). When fetching data using the to_Imputations navigation property we receive a 404 Resource not found type error:

In the RAP behavior definition, the FormHeader entity is declared as lock and authorization master, and its children entities (Attachments and Items) are lock dependent to its parent. However, we cannot define the lock dependency for the bottom hierarchy (ItemImputations). When trying to declare its lock dependency to the FormHeader entity, we get an error saying there's no navigation between ItemImputations and FormHeader; and when trying to declare the lock dependency to its actual parent (FormItems) we get another error saying that FormItems is not the lock master:

Here are some additional screenshots of the servicedefinitions that might prove useful:

Form Header.

FormItems.

ItemImputations.

Behavior Definition:

Please ignore any errors in naming conventions, as this is the first time using RAP for the backend team, we are aware of them and are planning to correct them ASAP.

Any guidance that could help our ABAP developers in finding where the service errors are would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to lock the batch & its quantity while using the function module VB_BATCH_DETERMINATION
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement where I have to determine the batch manually in an enhancement. I am using FM VB_BATCH_DETERMINATION for it. I am able to find out the available batches & respective available quantity.

In SAP standard when a batch determination takes place while creating a Production order using CO01, if a batch and its quantity is picked, it gets locked and not available to utilize this quantity anywhere else when the same batch is used.

Problem Statement : The same is not happening when I am executing this FM in the custom enhancement.

I would like to have the same functionality in the custom logic i.e. the execution of the FM VB_BATCH_DETERMINATION should lock the quantity & batch. How we can achieve that?

If not using the above FM, is there any other way that can be used to lock the batch & its respective quantity so that the same stock is not available anywhere else for any type of postings.

entry.title: How to call a search help by ABAP code in dynpro module?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need to reuse a search help for a dynpro field, I can't set the search help in the field of the UI structure since the search help import parameter is not exactly the same as the UI structure fields.

So, I want to call the search help by code, and set import parameter manually, does anyone have an example?

Regards,
Eric
